title: Ace Models MossGeorge wins big at national contest competition
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Ace Models MossGeorge proudly represented the Garden Route at the Ace Models National Competition (AMNC) 2025 at the Emerald Resort and Casino in Gauteng from 3 to 6 October.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Ace Models MossGeorge proudly represented the Garden Route at the Ace Models National Competition (AMNC) 2025 at the Emerald Resort and Casino in Gauteng from 3 to 6 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"With incredible talent and teamwork, Ace Models secured a total of 14 wins and over 30 placements, including being named franchise of the year and placing second in the intermediate showcase category."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ace Models MossGeorge secured a total of 14 wins at the national competition in Gauteng.","html":"Ace Models MossGeorge secured a total of 14 wins at the national competition in Gauteng."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We are more than just a modelling academy. We are a team committed to uplifting, supporting and empowering one another every step of the way.","html":"\"We are more than just a modelling academy. We are a team committed to uplifting, supporting and empowering one another every step of the way."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These awards reflect the heart and hard work of every individual involved,\" said Ace Models MossGeorge.","html":"These awards reflect the heart and hard work of every individual involved,\" said Ace Models MossGeorge."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
